title: When she sound on my board till I cache
subtitle: Sounds now load on-demand! They surprisingly didn't do that before :3... this wasn't a big issue because everything was *mostly* kept in cache- but it caused issues across multiple platforms where the sounds would hang or fail to start entirely. Also made the UX a little eaiser to use. I've combined some menu items so things are easier to discover, and there's now an 'info' menu that shows credits!

title: What are you doing in my house!?
subtitle: Network-First caching before GTA VI?
description: I appear to have made an oopsie when designing the loading system, because allthough the sound buttons updated, the actual sounds and UX did not update on refresh- instead prioritizing the local copy, which could be weeks old.
